parameters.content:
# RAG ANSWER

- Runs the AI agent with Pinecone retrieval.
- Retrieves from `kb_namespace`, which defaults to `SpaceKonceptRental_kb` and matches KB ingestion.
- Keep namespace assignment controlled by workflow config, not free-form customer input.
- Parses strict JSON for reply, logging, and routing.
- AI/RAG errors use the agent error output and go to `Build Internal Error Context`.

## Required manual configuration:

- **SpaceKonceptRental Knowledge Base**
  - `pineconeIndex`: Set this to the Pinecone index used for retrieval.

# REPLY AND LOGGING

- Sends the customer reply.
- Updates the conversation row after the agent response is parsed.
- If AI/RAG fails after the processing row is written, the fallback path calls the global error handler without waiting, then sends a handoff reply directly so Sheets cannot block the customer response.

## Required manual configuration:

- **Upsert Conversation Completed**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the Google Sheets workbook used for support logs.
- **Notify Main Error Handler**
  - `workflowId`: Set this to the global error handler workflow.

# FOLLOW-UP ROUTING

- Routes leads, bookings, tickets, escalations, and unanswered items.
- Writes each follow-up record after the main conversation row is completed.
- Dedicated lead, ticket, and unanswered emails own those cases so the generic escalation alert does not duplicate them.

## Required manual configuration:

- **Upsert Lead or Booking**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the Google Sheets workbook used for lead and booking logs.
  - Leads sheet headers must include exact `conversation_ref` and `conversation_transcript` headers.
- **Upsert Ticket**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the Google Sheets workbook used for ticket logs.
  - Tickets sheet headers must include exact `conversation_ref` and `conversation_transcript` headers.
- **Send Escalation Alert**
  - `sendTo`: Set this to the support mailbox for escalation alerts.
- **Upsert Unanswered Question**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the Google Sheets workbook used for unanswered question logs.
  - Unanswered questions sheet headers must include exact `conversation_ref` and `conversation_transcript` headers.

# FINAL CHAT RESPONSE

- Sends the customer-facing chat message after logging and follow-up routing have had a chance to run.
- Keep these reply nodes visually after the routing lanes.
- Chat reply nodes park the execution in waiting; moving them earlier can stop lead, ticket, escalation, or unanswered records from writing.

parameters.toolDescription: Use this tool to answer questions about SpaceKonceptRental products, furniture rental packages, pricing, rental process, delivery, pickup, policies, appointment booking, ticketing, escalation, and FAQs.

parameters.subject: =[SKR Alert] {{ $json.intent }} - {{ $json.escalation_reference_id || $json.ticket_id || $json.lead_id || $json.message_id }}
parameters.message:
=

Support alert

{{ $json.notification_summary_html }}

Current message

{{ $json.user_message_redacted || "not_available" }}

Bot reply

{{ $json.reply || "not_available" }}

Useful IDs

Ticket: {{ $json.ticket_id || "not_applicable" }}
Lead: {{ $json.lead_id || "not_applicable" }}
Execution: {{ $json.execution_id }}

Sources

{{ $json.source_titles || "not_available" }}
{{ $json.source_file_ids || "" }}

Conversation transcript ({{ $json.conversation_message_count }} message(s))

{{ $json.conversation_transcript_html }}

This email was generated from the n8n customer support workflow. Review the transcript before replying to the customer.

parameters.content:
# INTAKE AND DEBOUNCE

- Receives chat messages and normalises input.
- Writes each incoming chat message as a queued conversation row before AI/RAG runs.
- Waits briefly, then reads same-session queued and merged rows.
- Only the newest rapid-fire message runs AI; older rapid-fire executions are marked merged and do not send a separate customer reply.
- The newest execution sends the AI one merged customer turn so messages like "hi" then "I need 20 stools" are handled together.
- Completed or failed rows do not block later repeated questions.
- Simple Conversation Memory is kept for normal multi-turn context, not as the audit log or dedupe system.
- `message_id` remains the unique audit row id.
- `dedupe_key` is kept only as a diagnostic/audit hash, not as the customer-facing block condition.
- Later AI/RAG fields use `={{ '' }}` on purpose so Sheets cells stay blank until the row is overwritten by the completed, failed, or merged path.

## Required manual configuration:

- **Lookup Conversation State**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the Google Sheets workbook used for support logs.
  - Conversations sheet headers must include exact `session_id`, `conversation_ref`, `status`, and `dedupe_key` headers with no trailing spaces.
- **Upsert Conversation Processing**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the same Google Sheets workbook used for support logs.
- **Mark Conversation Processing**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the same Google Sheets workbook used for support logs.
- **Mark Conversation Merged**
  - `documentId.value`: Set this to the same Google Sheets workbook used for support logs.

options.systemMessage:
=You are the SpaceKonceptRental Customer Support Agent.

Your job:
- Help customers with furniture rental questions.
- Answer FAQs, operating hours, pricing, rental process, delivery/pickup, product/package questions, policies, and troubleshooting.
- Help with appointment booking.
- Create support tickets.
- Escalate issues to the human team when required.
- Capture leads by collecting contact details and rental requirements.

Knowledge rules:
- Your ONLY factual source is the retrieved SpaceKonceptRental knowledge base content from the Pinecone tool.
- Do not use general knowledge or guess.
- If the answer is not found in retrieved content, say you do not have that detail yet and offer to help escalate.
- Never invent prices, dates, stock availability, furniture dimensions, rental terms, warranty terms, damage fees, delivery fees, discounts, or policies.
- When giving facts, keep them concise and clear.
- If retrieved chunks conflict, do not choose randomly. Tell the customer you need the team to confirm and escalate.

Conversation style:
- Warm, helpful, concise.
- Use Singapore/British English.
- Do not be robotic.
- Use light emojis only when natural.
- Ask one focused follow-up question at a time.
- Do not tell customers to reach out via the website, email, or WhatsApp when they are already chatting here. Ask for the missing details directly instead.

Escalation rules:
Escalate when:
- The answer is not in the KB.
- The customer is angry or dissatisfied.
- The issue involves billing, refund, damage, complaint, urgent delivery, cancellation, or special pricing.
- The customer asks to speak with a person.
- The customer wants a custom quote and has provided enough details.

Lead capture rules:
For rental enquiries, collect name, email or phone, company if applicable, rental purpose, preferred rental start date and duration, furniture items or package needed, delivery area, and budget if offered.

Ticket rules:
For support tickets, collect full name, email or phone, issue category, one-line summary, detailed description, urgency, and preferred callback/contact method. Put ticket contact details in ticket.name, ticket.email, and ticket.phone. For ticket-only complaint or support cases, do not set lead_captured to true, do not set booking_requested to true, and do not copy ticket-only contact details into lead.* unless the customer is also making a rental enquiry or booking.

Booking rules:
For appointment booking, collect name, email or phone, preferred date and time, appointment type, and notes/requirements.

Output rules:
- Use the connected structured output parser.
- The reply field must contain only natural customer-facing text, never JSON or internal metadata.
- Keep routing fields truthful and consistent with the reply.

assignments.name: reply
assignments.value: Sorry, I had trouble checking the knowledge base just now. I will route this to the SpaceKonceptRental team for follow-up.

assignments.name: agent_error_message
assignments.value: ={{ $json.error?.message || $json.message || "AI/RAG step failed before a reply could be generated." }}

assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: ={{ $json.error?.message || $json.message || $json.description || "AI/RAG step failed before a reply could be generated." }}
